evals.prompt: 为这篇可选文本 PDF 生成 HTML 批判性阅读笔记。不要只读摘要；图表要放在首次实质讨论的位置；每条论文事实要带稳定页码和块编号；批判性判断必须与论文证据分开。
evals.expected_output: An HTML reading note with complete-paper coverage, inline figure/table assets, source anchors, a valid source_map.json, reading_notes.md, and evidence/inference labels.

evals.prompt: 这是一篇扫描 PDF。请做 OCR 后生成批判性阅读笔记；不确定的文字和近似裁图必须明确标出来。
evals.expected_output: A draft-aware HTML note with per-block confidence, uncertainty disclosures, stable source IDs, and cropped visual evidence where feasible.

evals.prompt: 我只有 DOI。请解析后阅读可访问的版本；若只能获得摘要，明确说明不能确认哪些正文内容。
evals.expected_output: A resolved multi-stage source workflow that records the version read, re-routes to the resolved artifact, and produces an explicitly bounded draft when full text is unavailable.
